highlights.title: YouTuber upgrades MacBook Neo to 1TB, posts ASMR video of the process
highlights.description:
YouTube creator DirectorFeng is back with another ASMR-themed video in which they attempt to upgrade the storage on a new Apple device. Watch it below.
more…

highlights.title: The Live Nation trial restarts with a ‘velvet hammer’
highlights.description:
After a chaotic week following the Justice Department's mid-trial settlement with Live Nation-Ticketmaster, the antitrust trial picked back up surprisingly smoothly on Monday - this time, with dozens of states leading the case. 
This isn't the outcome the states originally wanted. Out of concerns about being able to effectively take over the case and fear that the jury would be prejudiced by the shakeup, they requested a mistrial, which would have restarted the court battle at an unknown future date. But an irritated Judge Arun Subramanian seemed likely to deny the request, and once the states figured out how to retain the DOJ's expert witn …
Read the full story at The Verge.

highlights.title: Samsung to Stop Selling $2,899 TriFold Phone After Three Months
highlights.description: Samsung Electronics Co. is winding down sales of its Galaxy Z TriFold smartphone after roughly three months on the market, suggesting the $2,899 device was always intended as more of a technological showcase than a cornerstone of the company’s mobile lineup.

highlights.title: China’s Party Paper Urges Apple to Fix ‘Monopolistic’ Policies
highlights.description: Apple Inc. needs to ease app store restrictions and fix “monopolistic” practices, the Chinese ruling party’s flagship newspaper said just days after the iPhone maker agreed to cut local app store fees in a major concession.

highlights.title: UK To Invest £1 Billion into Quantum Computing Research, Trials
highlights.description: The UK will spend more than £1 billion ($1.3 billion) on quantum computing research over the next four years, as governments boost investment into a technology that’s increasingly considered critical to national security.

highlights.title: Dell updates Alienware gaming laptops with Intel’s Arrow Lake-HX Refresh CPUs — 16-inch models receive OLED display and GPU upgrades
highlights.description: Dell expands Alienware 16 Area-51, Alienware 16X Aurora, and Alienware 18 Area-51 laptops with new Intel Arrow Lake-HX Refresh processor options.

highlights.title: What’s new in Android’s March 2026 Google System Updates [U]
highlights.description:
The monthly “Google System Release Notes” primarily detail what’s new in Play services, Play Store, and Play system update across Android phones/tablets, Wear OS, Google/Android TV, Auto, and PC. Some features apply to end users, while others are aimed at developers.
more…

highlights.title: Bitcoin’s derivatives-led rally is already unraveling. Prices are back below $75,000
highlights.description: Bitcoin briefly surged to a six-week high above $75,000 before quickly retreating, underscoring the fragility of the latest rally.

highlights.title: Memory Chip Crunch to Persist Until 2030, SK Chairman Says
highlights.description: A global shortage of memory chips is likely to persist another four to five years because of endemic constraints in semiconductor production, the head of South Korean conglomerate SK Group said.
